ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skaters" (
  "skater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skater */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the skater */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nation the skater represents */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the skater */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the skater's coach */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location where the skater trains */,
  "skating_level" TEXT /* Skating level of the skater (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the championship */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the championship took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the championship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the championship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Men's Singles, Ladies' Singles) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event took place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., short program, free skate) */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline of the event (e.g., men's, ladies', pairs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "skater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skater */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "tfp" REAL /* Technical Figure Points (TFP) */,
  "sp" REAL /* Short Program (SP) score */,
  "fs" REAL /* Free Skate (FS) score */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_skater_id FOREIGN KEY ("skater_id") REFERENCES skaters ("skater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nation the judge represents */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of judging experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_scores" (
  "judge_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge score entry */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship */,
  "skater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skater */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the skater in the championship */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score of the skater in the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_skater_id FOREIGN KEY ("skater_id") REFERENCES skaters ("skater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, scorekeeper) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
